_comment: Copy to ~/.taw/mcp.json (or <project>/.taw/mcp.json) and fill in. tawx connects to every server here and exposes their tools to the model. Never commit real tokens.

playwright._note: stdio server — drives a local Chromium. Run `npx -y @playwright/mcp` on first use.

shipkit._note: HTTP server, OAuth-protected. Reuse the Bearer token Claude Code already obtained (see ~/.claude/mcp_servers.json). JWTs expire — refresh by re-copying when you get a 401.
